objective: Add a deterministic floor for the Wave 39 heuristic signature-target shard without promoting those rows into exact supervision.
non_negotiables: The baseline must evaluate only label_kind=heuristic rows.
The target must be read from heuristic.outputs and must support a heuristic.method filter.
The report must preserve train/dev/test target-support coverage, including labels unseen relative to train.
The result is a diagnostic floor only; it must not activate exact supervision or learned-model claims.

tasks.prompt: Add a heuristic-target-report CLI command that evaluates a train-majority floor over heuristic.outputs.<target_field>, filters by heuristic.method, records exclusions, and reports split target-support coverage.
outputs: Smoke coverage for train/dev/test heuristic targets and unseen labels
commands: python3 -m py_compile engine/ml_model.py engine/test.py agents/network.py agents/label_schema.py
acceptance: The smoke test proves that only heuristic rows feed target metrics.
Dev/test labels unseen relative to train are recorded.

tasks.prompt: Run the deterministic train-majority floor on docs/signature_target_diagnostic_wave_39.jsonl, record the report hash and metrics, and update ledgers while keeping promotion closed.
acceptance: The report includes 30 heuristic targets with train/dev/test counts 25/3/2.
The train-majority floor scores 0.04 train accuracy and 0.0 dev/test accuracy.
All dev/test labels are recorded as unseen relative to train.
Docs state that this is a diagnostic floor, not exact or learned-model evidence.

integration_gates.command: python3 agents/network.py validate && python3 agents/network.py validate-wave agents/waves/wave_40_heuristic_target_floor.json
integration_gates.success_signal: The Wave 40 plan is internally consistent.
The heuristic target floor report is valid JSON.

integration_gates.command: python3 -m py_compile engine/ml_model.py engine/test.py agents/network.py agents/label_schema.py && python3 engine/test.py
integration_gates.success_signal: The heuristic floor implementation and regression smoke pass.
